Hybrid cache layer: `IOutputCache` + `IMemoryCache` across 5 services; `CacheOptions` configurable from appsettings (`Cache:` section); `WebExtensions.cs` extracted from `Startup.cs`. Previous: Backoffice BC complete â€” TIER 1 (9 services), TIER 2 (9 controllers + 21 views), TIER 3 (58 unit tests). ADR-0020 Proposedâ†’Accepted._

## What is NOT started yet (in priority order)

> **Strategy â€” Parallel Change, build-first:** All BCs are built alongside legacy code before any atomic switch is executed.
> Atomic switches are deferred until ~80â€“95% of backend BC implementations are complete.
> Two blocker types: **`implementation blocked`** (true stop â€” hard dependency missing) vs **`atomic switch blocked`** (implementation proceeds in parallel now).

1. **Presale/Checkout Slice 2** (steps 11â€“14 in ADR-0012) â€” âś… **Switch live** â€” implementation complete, integration tests done, EC-001 decision documented
2. **Sales/Coupons Slice 2** (ADR-0016 Â§9) â€” âś… **Switch complete**; Domain âś… Application âś… (rules engine, 15 evaluators + auto-injected CouponOversizeGuard = 16 total, contracts, workflow builder) Infrastructure âś… (5 adapters/repos: StockAvailabilityChecker, CompletedOrderCounter, SpecialEventCache, CouponApplicationRecordRepository, NullRuntimeCouponSource); **design amendments completed** (Â§10): CouponOversizeGuard â€” always-on constraint rule with per-coupon `BypassOversizeGuard` override (no global toggle), Catalogâ†’Coupons name sync (3 messages: ProductNameChanged, CategoryNameChanged, TagNameChanged + 3 handlers + IScopeTargetRepository); **stacking strategy implemented** in `ApplyCouponAsync` (Rule A: fixed-value guard vs `OriginalTotal`, Rule B: `effectivePrice` fail-fast + reduction cap, `OrderPriceAdjusted.NewPrice` multi-coupon fix); **dead code cleanup**: `AddCouponAsync` removed from `ICouponService`/`CouponService`; **atomic switch done** â€” controller in `Areas/Sales`, DI wired, `IDbContextMigrator<CouponsDbContext>` registered, DB migration auto-applies, no legacy code remains. 44 unit tests passing.
3. **Sales/Fulfillment Slice 2** (ADR-0017 Â§11) â€” âś… **Switch live** â€” ShipmentController deployed to Areas/Sales, full shipment lifecycle UI (create/dispatch/deliver/fail). Domain âś… Application âś… Infrastructure âś… Web âś…
4. **Supporting/Communication BC** â€” âś… unblocked (Fulfillment Slice 1 + Coupons Slice 1 both live)
5. **Backoffice BC** â€” âś… **DONE** â€” TIER 1 (9 services), TIER 2 (9 controllers + 21 views), TIER 3 (58 unit tests). ADR-0020 Accepted.
6. **Per-BC DbContext interfaces** (ADR-0013) â€” âś… **DONE** â€” 10 interfaces, 27 repos updated, DI aliases registered, background services updated

---

## Key architectural invariants (do not violate)

- `BusinessException` + `ExceptionMiddleware` pipeline â€” no raw try/catch in controllers
- All cross-BC integration via `IMessageBroker` (in-memory) â€” no direct service-to-service calls across BC boundaries
- `ApplicationUser` must not appear as a navigation property in any domain model â€” only `string UserId`
- Cart CRUD lives in `ICartService`; checkout coordination lives in `ICheckoutService` (Presale BC)
- `SoftReservation.UnitPrice` is immutable after creation â€” price captured at checkout initiation, not at add-to-cart
- `StockSnapshot` is updated via `StockAvailabilityChanged` event â€” never polled directly from Inventory
- **Controller routing strategy** ([ADR-0024](../../docs/adr/0024/README.md)): Web = new Area-based routes (`/Sales/Orders/*`, `/Presale/Checkout/*`), legacy controllers stay active; API = in-place swap, same routes; Identity = unchanged

---
